name: codex-commit
description: Generate commit messages and branch names from your Git diff with Codex, right inside VS Code.

codexCommit.codexPath.description: Path to the codex CLI. Leave empty to use PATH resolution.

codexCommit.promptTemplate.default:
You are a senior engineer.
Generate a git commit message based ONLY on the staged diff.

Output format:
1) First line: Conventional Commits (feat|fix|refactor|docs|test|chore|perf|build|ci)(optional scope): subject (<= 72 chars)
2) Blank line
3) Bullet points (optional)

Staged diff:
{{diff}}
codexCommit.promptTemplate.description: Prompt template for Codex. Use {{diff}} to insert the staged diff.

codexCommit.branchPromptTemplate.default:
You are a senior engineer.
Generate a concise git branch name based ONLY on the provided git diff.

Rules:
- Output one branch name only, with no explanation.
- Use lowercase.
- Use kebab-case.
- Prefer prefixes like feat/, fix/, chore/, docs/, refactor/, test/.

Diff:
{{diff}}
codexCommit.branchPromptTemplate.description: Prompt template for branch names. Use {{diff}} to insert staged+unstaged diff.

enumDescriptions: Default (Codex CLI default; effort also uses codex CLI/model default)
Flagship frontier model for professional work with strong coding, reasoning, tool use, and agentic workflows. Effort: none, low, medium, high, xhigh.
Industry-leading coding model for complex software engineering. Its coding capabilities now also power GPT-5.4. Effort: low, medium, high, xhigh.
Text-only research preview model optimized for near-instant, real-time coding iteration.
Advanced coding model for real-world engineering. Succeeded by GPT-5.3-Codex. Effort: low, medium, high, xhigh.
Previous general-purpose model for coding and agentic tasks across industries and domains. Succeeded by GPT-5.4. Effort: none, low, medium, high, xhigh.
A version of GPT-5.1-Codex optimized for long-running tasks. Effort: none, medium, high, xhigh.
Great for coding and agentic tasks across domains. Succeeded by GPT-5.2. Effort: none, low, medium, high.
A version of GPT-5.1 optimized for agentic coding in Codex.
Smaller, more cost-effective, less-capable version of GPT-5.1-Codex.
A version of GPT-5 optimized for agentic coding in Codex.
Smaller, more cost-effective version of GPT-5-Codex. Succeeded by GPT-5.1-Codex-Mini.
Previous intelligent reasoning model for coding and agentic tasks across domains. Succeeded by GPT-5.1. Effort: minimal, low, medium, high.
Default (do not pass effort; use codex CLI/model default)
none
minimal
low
medium
high
xhigh
codexCommit.effort.description: Reasoning effort passed via `codex exec -c model_reasoning_effort=...`. Empty keeps codex CLI default.

codexCommit.debugLog.description: Write debug logs (spawned command, model argument, codex stdout/stderr, parsed assistant message) to the 'Codex Commit' output channel.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
